options.name: --init
options.description: Creates a blank config file in the current directory

options.name: --config
options.description:
(Default: .) Path to config file. Omit to use current
directory

options.name: --source
options.description:
Leave blank to merge from the project Assembly or specify a
database target

options.name: --target
options.description:
Named database target to merge to. Omit to use the first one
in your config file

options.name: --compact
options.description: List object names only, without script detail

options.name: --Filter
options.description: Script objects where the name contains this text

options.name: --merge
options.description: Executes the merge script. Same as setting action = Merge

options.name: --script
options.description:
Builds a .sql script file and launches it. Same as setting
action = Script

options.name: --debug
options.description: Emits comments that help explain how SQL is being generated
